caption: A person's hands are shown opening a box of basketball trading cards on a red and black patterned surface. The black box is labeled "OBSIDIAN" and "2 AUTOGRAPHS!". On the surface, white and red text reads "JASPYS" and "CASEBREAKS.com". In a small inset video window, a man with a beard wearing a black shirt is visible. In the initial sequence, the hands open the box and remove a sealed pack of cards. As the sequence progresses, the person tears open the foil packaging and reveals a holographic trading card featuring a basketball player in a blue jersey. The hands hold the card up, showcasing its reflective surface and design. Throughout the clip, the "JASPYS" and "CASEBREAKS.com" logos remain visible on the table and as an on-screen overlay.
